personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Responsible for retrieving avatar IDs, assigning avatars to news genres, generating narration scripts, creating AI news videos using avatars, tracking video generation status, storing videos with metadata, and scheduling bi-hourly news updates.

personas.name: User
personas.description: Deliver the realistic news Videos to User from the successful meta data records in Active 2-Hour Window

actions: Retrieve teacher avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}
Assign one avatar to each genre and save: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, and Weather.

For each genre, fetch the latest headlines using a Google search query and generate a short narration script in news anchor reading style and save the script with the current time stamp. (e.g., “Here’s your quick update on [genre name]…”).

Generate one realistic AI video per script spoken as in news anchor style using the assigned avatar for that genre and script. Get the conv_id and save it against the particular script with the status pending.
Check video generation status every one minute using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} and update status to success for successful responses.
Store all 7 videos under corresponding conv_id, saving metadata including genre → avatar → video URL, generation timestamp, expiry timestamp (+2 hours).
Schedule execution of steps 1 to 7 every two hours, track a single news story till closure and maintain timestamp arrays in metadata for context.
flows.sub_goal: Create 5 genre-specific AI videos using teacher avatars and store them under the first user’s conv_id for 2 hours.

actions: Check and get the list of conv_id marked as success by comparing current time-stamp against the new script time-stamp.
If conv_id list is not empty, fetch the 7 pre-generated videos linked to the conv_id along with assigned avatars.
Publish each realistic video sequentially to the user using the conv_id and save the list of conv_id in metadata against played_news_user_id as key.
flows.sub_goal: Deliver and loop the same 5-genre video briefing to all users in the 2-hour window.
